about.title: Your Strategic Partner for Global Industrial Sourcing
about.text1: Founded in Turin in 1969, with strong roots in European mechanical engineering, we have transformed decades of expertise into an operational model designed to meet the challenges of global industry.
about.text2: Today, we are a trusted partner in the supply of custom-engineered industrial components, operating both as a technical-commercial agency and as a lead contractor, providing a single point of contact responsible for managing multiple product categories.
about.text3: Through a network of qualified suppliers across Europe, China, and India, combined with extensive expertise in international logistics, we connect your projects with the world's most advanced manufacturing technologies, ensuring flexibility, reliability, and a customer-focused approach tailored to your specific needs.

agency.label: Technical & Commercial Agency
agency.description: We act as a strategic partner on the ground, connecting the needs of manufacturing companies with the technological capabilities of leading production facilities and foundries.
agency.card1Description: We analyze the customer's technical drawings to identify the most suitable and cost-effective manufacturing technology.
agency.card2Description: We oversee the entire process, from quotation and cost evaluation to tooling and mold production, through to sample validation and approval.
agency.card3Description: We ensure seamless communication and continuous engineering support between the customer and the manufacturing facility.

procurement.label: Lead Contractor & Global Procurement Services
procurement.description: We serve as a single point of contact responsible for sourcing mechanical components, castings, and complex subassemblies, relieving customers from the challenges of managing fragmented supply chains.
procurement.card1Description: We leverage a network of carefully selected and certified suppliers across Europe, China, and India, ensuring full compliance with Western quality standards through regular audits and on-site inspections.
procurement.card2Description: We centralize the procurement of components manufactured through different technologies—including stamping, foundry processes, and CNC machining—delivering complete packages or fully integrated subassemblies.
procurement.card3Description: We coordinate order planning and international logistics flows. Our structure allows us to consolidate purchases and shipments from multiple European suppliers to overseas markets (e.g., containerized ocean freight to the U.S. market), optimizing logistics costs and operational efficiency.

processes.title: Our Core Manufacturing Expertise
processes.text: Thanks to a well-established network of qualified foundries and manufacturing partners, we are able to supply components produced using some of the most advanced material processing technologies available today.

card1.title: Precision Die Casting
card1.description: High-pressure casting technology ideally suited for high-volume production runs requiring tight tolerances, excellent surface finishes, and thin-wall designs.

zamak.title: Zamak (Zinc Alloys)
zamak.text: Outstanding casting fluidity, making it ideal for complex geometries, ultra-thin walls, and components requiring premium decorative electroplating and surface finishing.

aluminum.title: Aluminum
aluminum.text: The perfect balance of lightweight performance, mechanical strength, and thermal conductivity for automotive and industrial applications.

magnesium.title: Magnesium
magnesium.text: The preferred choice when maximum weight reduction is a critical engineering requirement, without compromising structural rigidity.

card2.title: Investment Casting
card2.description: Production of metal components with exceptionally high dimensional accuracy using wax-pattern molds.
card2.item:
This process enables the creation of highly complex internal and external geometries that cannot be achieved with conventional casting technologies, significantly reducing—or even eliminating—the need for subsequent machining operations. 
Suitable for a wide range of alloys and specialty steels.

card3.title: Forgings (Hot Forging)
card3.description: Semi-finished components produced through the plastic deformation of metal at high temperatures.
card3.item: This process provides significantly superior mechanical properties and fatigue resistance compared to cast components, making it the ideal solution for critical parts subjected to high structural loads and demanding operating conditions.

card4.title: Precision Machining
card4.item:
Production of metal components with high and ultra-high geometric accuracy through CNC machining, using solid semi-finished materials (bars, blocks and extrusions) or cast blanks. 
This process enables micron-level dimensional tolerances and superior surface finishes that cannot be achieved through casting or forming processes alone.

card5.title: M.I.M. (Metal Injection Molding)
card5.item:
Production of small metal components with high and ultra-high geometric precision using metal powders blended with polymer binders. 
This process enables the production of highly complex three-dimensional geometries and ultra-thin wall sections, inspired by plastic injection molding and impossible to achieve through conventional machining processes, virtually eliminating secondary finishing operations in high-volume production. 
Suitable for a wide range of stainless steels, carbon steels and tool steels.

whyChooseUs.title: One Partner. Greater Efficiency. Less Complexity.
whyChooseUs.subtitle: Why Choose Us

slide1.label: Decades of Experience
slide1.text: More than 50 years in the industrial sector have enabled us to build a network of qualified suppliers and develop technical expertise that is difficult to replicate.

slide2.label: From Design to Serial Production
slide2.text: We support our customers from the earliest stages of product development, optimizing manufacturing processes and proactively addressing potential challenges.

slide3.label: End-to-End Supply Management
slide3.text: We take care of the entire supply chain: supplier sourcing, project management, serial production orders, quality control, claims management, logistics, and shipping.

slide4.label: Customer - Centric Approach
slide4.text: Your needs are at the heart of every decision we make. We do not offer standard solutions—every project is managed according to its specific requirements.

slide5.label: Supplier Base Optimization
slide5.text: We reduce the complexity of your supplier network by consolidating multiple product categories under a single partner, generating benefits in terms of cost efficiency and supply chain governance.

contact.title: Let's Discuss Your Project
contact.subtitle: Contact
contact.text: We're ready to support you at every stage.
